response.global_analysis: 1. Song & Performer Match: Identified the first song as 'Trust Me' (by Omaru Polka, Kaela Kovalskia, and Koseki Bijou), the intermission dialogue by Kaela Kovalskia, and the final ballad as 'My Dear' (originally by Tokoyami Towa, performed by Towa and Kaela). 2. Reference JSON: Used the provided scene list to cross-check lyrics and dialogue sections, correcting the listed performers based on visual cues. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed precisely to matches vocal activity, avoiding cascading delays during rap verses, and translating Kaela's English/Japanese/Indonesian dialogue during the intermission scene.

subtitles.original: Trust me 未来へ歩き出そう
subtitles.english: Trust me, let's start walking toward the future

subtitles.original: そう 君のために僕がいるんだ
subtitles.english: Yes, I am here for your sake

subtitles.original: I'm here そばにいるから
subtitles.english: I'm here, because I'll be by your side

subtitles.original: Call me 僕がいるから
subtitles.english: Call me, because I am here

subtitles.original: Trust me もう何も恐れないで
subtitles.english: Trust me, don't be afraid of anything anymore

subtitles.original: My dear 見えない糸で
subtitles.english: My dear, with an invisible thread

subtitles.original: Trust me 繋がっているから
subtitles.english: Trust me, because we are connected

subtitles.original: ただ感じていてこの温もり
subtitles.english: Just feel this warmth

subtitles.original: いつまでもそばにいる forever
subtitles.english: I'll always be by your side, forever

subtitles.original: いつまでも離れない never ever
subtitles.english: I'll never ever leave you

subtitles.original: 君がいれば whatever you do
subtitles.english: If you're here, whatever you do

subtitles.original: ねぇ僕に教えて whatever you say
subtitles.english: Hey, tell me, whatever you say

subtitles.original: 辛いことあれば全て飲み込み
subtitles.english: If there are hard times, swallow them all

subtitles.original: もしそれでも無理ならば込み込み
subtitles.english: And if it's still too much, take it all in

subtitles.original: You're my love, you're my shine, you're my dear
subtitles.english: You're my love, you're my shine, you're my dear

subtitles.original: 世界敵に回しても trust me
subtitles.english: Even if I turn the whole world into an enemy, trust me

subtitles.original: Trust me
subtitles.english: Trust me

subtitles.original: Baby
subtitles.english: Baby

subtitles.original: 泣いてみればいい 頼ってみればいい
subtitles.english: It's okay to cry, it's okay to rely on me

subtitles.original: そのすべてを受け止めると決めた
subtitles.english: I've decided to accept all of it

subtitles.original: I'm here どこにいたって
subtitles.english: I'm here, no matter where you are

subtitles.original: Call me 一つになれる
subtitles.english: Call me, we can become one

subtitles.original: Trust me この思いほどけないから
subtitles.english: Trust me, because these feelings will never come undone

subtitles.original: My dear 抱えた荷物
subtitles.english: My dear, the burden you carry

subtitles.original: Trust me 下ろしてみればいい
subtitles.english: Trust me, you should try putting it down

subtitles.original: そう 君のために僕がいるんだ
subtitles.english: Yes, I am here for your sake

subtitles.original: I'm here そばにいるから
subtitles.english: I'm here, because I'll be by your side

subtitles.english: Call me, because I am here

subtitles.english: Trust me, don't be afraid of anything anymore

subtitles.english: My dear, with an invisible thread

subtitles.english: Trust me, because we are connected

subtitles.original: ただ感じていてこの温もり
subtitles.english: Just feel this warmth

subtitles.original: With me もう払わないで
subtitles.english: With me, don't brush me away

subtitles.original: Give me 心を開いて
subtitles.english: Give me, open your heart

subtitles.original: Feel me すべてを伝えて
subtitles.english: Feel me, convey everything

subtitles.original: With me 言葉はいらない
subtitles.english: With me, no words are needed

subtitles.original: Give me 見つめ合えばいい
subtitles.english: Give me, just gaze at each other

subtitles.original: Feel me すべてを azukete
subtitles.english: Feel me, leave everything to me

subtitles.original: Hello? Anybody here?
subtitles.english: Hello? Is anyone here?

subtitles.original: Okay, I have played enough horror games, and I don't know why, but it reminds me of something similar.
subtitles.english: Okay, I have played enough horror games, and I don't know why, but it reminds me of something similar.

subtitles.original: Should I read this? Maybe?
subtitles.english: Should I read this? Maybe?

subtitles.original: 何が目的ですか？ 何でいるんですか？
subtitles.english: What is your purpose? Why are you here?

subtitles.original: キレてますか？ 怒ってますか？
subtitles.english: Are you angry? Are you mad?

subtitles.original: ここにいていいですか？
subtitles.english: Can I stay here?

subtitles.original: 戻ります。帰りましょうか？ 戻ろうか？
subtitles.english: I'm returning. Shall we go back? Shall I return?

subtitles.original: 何すればいい？ 何か手伝いますか？
subtitles.english: What should I do? Can I help with anything?

subtitles.original: 敵意はありますか？
subtitles.english: Is there hostility?

subtitles.original: 何者ですか？ どこにいますか？ 近くにいますか？
subtitles.english: Who are you? Where are you? Are you nearby?

subtitles.original: 出てきて！ アピールしてください！ もしもし？
subtitles.english: Come out! Make yourself known! Hello?

subtitles.original: Okay, that door looks similar to the entrance door. Is that the exit?
subtitles.english: Okay, that door looks similar to the entrance door. Is that the exit?

subtitles.original: Or is that a trap?
subtitles.english: Or is that a trap?

subtitles.original: Well, if this is a horror game, should I try to scream?
subtitles.english: Well, if this is a horror game, should I try to scream?

subtitles.original: AAAAAAHHH!!!
subtitles.english: AAAAAAHHH!!!

subtitles.original: Diam!
subtitles.english: Quiet!

subtitles.original: Eh?
subtitles.english: Eh?

subtitles.original: そう 悲しみを優しさに
subtitles.english: Yes, turn sadness into kindness

subtitles.original: 自分らしさを力に
subtitles.english: Turn your true self into strength

subtitles.original: 迷いながらでもいい
subtitles.english: It's okay to wander/lose your way

subtitles.original: 歩き出して
subtitles.english: Keep walking forward

subtitles.original: もう一回
subtitles.english: One more time

subtitles.original: もう一回
subtitles.english: One more time

subtitles.original: 誰かの期待にずっと応え
subtitles.english: Always meeting someone else's expectations

subtitles.original: 褒められるのが好きなのですか？
subtitles.english: Do you just love being praised?

subtitles.original: 鳴り止まぬブザー すり抜けても
subtitles.english: Even if you slip through the endless buzzers

subtitles.original: 笑顔はいつでも素敵ですか？
subtitles.english: Is your smile always wonderful?

subtitles.original: 始まりだけ...
subtitles.english: Waking up dreaming...

subtitles.original: 夢見て起きる
subtitles.english: ...only of the beginning

subtitles.original: そのサヨナラは いつか
subtitles.english: That goodbye will someday...

subtitles.original: いつか
subtitles.english: ...someday...

subtitles.original: 自分の腕で
subtitles.english: ...be held in your own arms

subtitles.original: そう 大事なものはいつも
subtitles.english: Yes, the important things are always...

subtitles.original: 形のないもの
subtitles.english: ...things without a shape
